fields.helpText: This field stores the date/time that the HL7 message was added to the  file.
This field identifies the type or source of the HL7 message - IFC or PRF.
This field stores the Message ID (MSH-10).  It is extracted from the MSH  segment by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.
This field holds the VistA Consult number for IFC type messages.  It is extracted from the ORC segment (ORC-4) by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.
This field stores the Cerner order number.  It is extracted from the ORC  segment (ORC-3) by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.
This field stores the patient's name.  It is extracted from the PID  segment (PID-6) by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.
This field stores the patient's ICN.  It is extracted from the PID segment (PID-6) by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.
This field stores the sending site.  It is extracted from the MSH  segment (MSH-4.1) by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.     Note: If MSH-4.1 is blank, CERNER is used.
This field stores the receiving site.  It is extracted from the MSH  segment (MSH-6.1) by the filing software (FILE^EHMHL7) and populated automatically.     Note: If MSH-6.1 is blank, CERNER is used.
This word processing field stores the HL7 message.
